properties.value: <policies><inbound><validate-azure-ad-token tenant-id="{{AZURE_TENANT_ID}}" header-name="Authorization" failed-validation-httpcode="401" failed-validation-error-message="Unauthorized" output-token-variable-name="jwt"><audiences><audience>api://{{ENTRA_APP_CLIENT_ID}}</audience></audiences></validate-azure-ad-token><rate-limit-by-key calls="60" renewal-period="60" counter-key="@(context.Request.IpAddress)" /></inbound><backend><base /></backend><outbound><set-header name="X-Content-Type-Options" exists-action="override"><value>nosniff</value></set-header><set-header name="X-Frame-Options" exists-action="override"><value>DENY</value></set-header><set-header name="Cache-Control" exists-action="override"><value>no-store</value></set-header></outbound><on-error><base /></on-error></policies>
